title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at The Man Company Digital Technologies - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at The Man Company Digital Technologies - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with The Man Company Digital Technologies! We are hiring a Digital Marketing Manager for our Tiruchirappalli team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About The Man Company Digital Technologies:
The Man Company Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in A/B Testing

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Referral bonus program
• Annual performance appraisal
• Flexible working hours
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with The Man Company Digital Technologies!
